vectors.name: initiator-both-directions
vectors.description: The initiator signs the receipt content: the agreed-terms hash, the two directional salt-free payload digests (initiator->responder and responder->initiator), and the initiator-role binder. Any implementation seeded identically and given this session key and content must reproduce the fingerprint, the binder, and the Ed25519 signature.

vectors.name: responder-distinct-identity
vectors.description: The responder signs the same directional content (both parties key the two directions identically). Uses the same session key (both parties derive the initiator-role binder) but a distinct identity, and its role names the responder-role binder derivation to pin that label too.
